star_1.text: Game shuts down every time right after opening. Not worth the time. ABSOLUTELY UNPLAYABLE.
I spend more time watching ads than playing the game
game glitches and gets stuck on every 3rd level played , please fix bug.
just a worse gameplay and ad heavier version of other similar games. geckos are slow to clear and an ad after every level is ridiculous.
Appalling, half hour ticking no consent to the next day requesting again. dont bother.

star_2.text: The game is fun, challenging but not impossible. Not happy with an ad I've started seeing recently. It's spam for an anti-virus product which opens while I'm playing and automatically redirects me to it's own website - so I can purchase their product to supposedly clean my infected phone. A very deceptive, dishonest and, IMO, dangerous ad. It's one thing if I choose to open a website, it's another when it's done for me under false pretenses. Will uninstall the game if it continues.
love the game, but the new quest features are not working properly and are frustrating. i can clear the first task but none of the rest so I can't get the rewards for it.
Fun game, there is definitely enough time to play the levels. could be addictive but the graphics is horrible.
I play daily. alot, but when I've completed the quest I am not getting the reward
you dont get your rewards when you complete daily tasks

I think this game uses AI guys. If you can't stand AI, drop the game. I am sure there are games with actual original art you can find elsewhere. Gameplay is nice for the first few minutes but you can get bored fast.

star_3.text: This game is MUCH easier than Gecko Out, almosttoo easy. There are ads after level 100, every 2 lvs. Levels are very easy/quick without ever running out of time. Level 267 isn't passable w/o using power-ups. They put the wrong geckos on the wrong side of a lock or smthg... doesn't make any sense, as it's the only level thus far that this happened. I spent days trying to figure it out and finally caved and used power-ups, and since it hasn't happened again. cldbt find any cust serv to ask.

Gave it 100 levels, but it's way too easy. There's no challenge at all, except for dealing with the clunky controls and trying to tell the difference between 3 different shades of baby-poop brown. Also, geckos don't have ears.

2.5 if possible. Fun? Yes. Colors are hard to differentiate on a few. Mechanics of movement need worked on. Makes it really hard to enjoy when you've drug a gecko to a spot, but it stops halfway through for no reason.

Biggest issue is that the goals are not tracking. Second biggest is the movement being sticky. Otherwise I do appreciate that I have yet to encounter a level that COULDN'T possibly be beaten without a purchase.
Good game, I play daily and want to rate it higher but after a time the quest isnt working and doesn't log the entries to get the award.
They say the game is not on a timer but it is on every level so far. Didn't want to have to stress... will be deleting.
Too many adds. Been playing for 30 mins and its still not challenging enough, at least not as far as I have played, but it does give you coins to play Gin Rummy.
Suitable for pre-schoolers, too easy for a 10yo or any capable adults.
I got to level 24 without failing a single level and I'm out of hearts?! How do I run out of hearts when I haven't lost a level yet? that makes no sense whatsoever
Why have unlimited timer if it doesn't work and keep letting you Play after you went through the 5
love the game but the daily tasks do not work.
good game but with the snakes moved smoothly they keep getting stuck
Game play is mediocre. not as smooth as Gecko Out

sangat menyedihkan, saya ganti hp baru, tapi game gecko di hp lama tidak ikut pindah padahal saya sudah level 600, saya harus ulang lagi dari level 1 di hp baru,tlong beritahu saya bila bisa kembali ke level lama 🥲🥲

star_4.text: fun and helps pass the time. the geckos don't always move smoothly and kinda lag a little so it's a little difficult to maneuver them sometimes. otherwise great. prefer this to gecko out for time, coins and rewards, prefer gecko out for ease of movement
fun game but geckos get hung up and movement can be sticky and slow down play

The game and logic is very good. I dont like how the haptic feels. Sometimes a gecko won't continue forward if the hole before it is still disappearing which costs you a second and in later levels that could make or break the puzzle time.
nice game but its a little lag, causing sub optimal experience

star_5.text: Fun without emptying your wallet! I was very excited to find an alternative to Gecko Out because that was costing too much. I also like that the timer does not begin counting down until you've moved a gecko, giving you time to first assess the board and what strategy you need. Happily playing this daily!
prefer this to Gecko Out as you have a bit more time for each level. The colours aren't as clear though. They need to be brighter as it gets a bit confusing sometimes.
fun and reasonably challenging without having to pay for advantages. am at level 38 so far and it plays well with intuitive movements
Glad I'm not buying stuff left and right just to finish a level, and no ads...SO HAPPY I FOUND THIS APP, I CAN ACTUALLY PLAY AND NOT HAVE TO SPEND MONEY! THAT'S KEY AND I LOVE THAT!

love the geckos smiles with the tongue hanging out.. need little more time to cruise through the maze.. i hate ads.. i would rather prefer to replay.. than looking into nonsence called advertisement..
really I love this game, but 1 suggestion I would like to say that the colours of Gecko are very dim, It would be preferable if colour may bright. else everything seems me good... thanks developers.
very good game can be hard at times but at least you can move on without having to buy lots of boosters
Great game. only a few adds, and the timer isn't too strict so you can really waste your ti... i mean enjoy the game!
Great game. Beige colour s need to be more defined as they look similar and waste time. Play other Gecko games but liking this so far.
such a fun game... Just glitching out on level 152... im left with the wrong colors and no moves left to make. anyone else having this issue?
Fantastic Game, and so far no ads, fingers crossed it stays that way!
love it! challenging but even extremely difficult levels can be passed without help
smooth movement of the geckos and beautiful colors. love the planning of the moves.
Love this game because it's not super frustrating like other games
odd play concept but very cute
So far it's fun and relaxing 😌💚👌😎💜👍
similar games like this are not this smooth. colorful fun version
it's a fun, color and think game.
i really appreciate it game too much
mai suggest kr rhi hu sabko ki download kro bht hi acha game hai
